expected.notes: I-20 program end date is 45 days from now, which is less than 60 days, so program_end_approaching must fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'program_end_approaching'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - extraction_a.end_date lt 60_days_from_now
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
